records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? I expected a big reaction, but everyone's awfully quiet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? I expected a big reaction, but everyone's awfully quiet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? I expected a big reaction, but everyone's awfully quiet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Watch it, missy. Just how hard did you ride the others for them to be that jumpy around you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Watch it, missy. Just how hard did you ride the others for them to be that jumpy around you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Watch it, missy. Just how hard did you ride the others for them to be that jumpy around you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't think that's it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't think that's it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't think that's it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Probably.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Probably.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Probably.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hansol, did I really just see what I think I saw?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hansol, did I really just see what I think I saw?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hansol, did I really just see what I think I saw?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A ship crash-landed right in the middle of enemy territory... and Captain leapt out of it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A ship crash-landed right in the middle of enemy territory... and Captain leapt out of it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A ship crash-landed right in the middle of enemy territory... and Captain leapt out of it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's not another Doppelganger-type C.O., is it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's not another Doppelganger-type C.O., is it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's not another Doppelganger-type C.O., is it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Without a special Artifact, that would be impossible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Without a special Artifact, that would be impossible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Without a special Artifact, that would be impossible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So it's really her?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So it's really her?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So it's really her?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seems... like it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seems... like it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seems... like it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're late, Captain! Where the hell have you been all this time?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're late, Captain! Where the hell have you been all this time?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're late, Captain! Where the hell have you been all this time?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And what's with the robe? Trying out a new style? or are you pulling a Hansol and going for a whole phase like his bamboo sword thing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And what's with the robe? Trying out a new style? or are you pulling a Hansol and going for a whole phase like his bamboo sword thing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And what's with the robe? Trying out a new style? or are you pulling a Hansol and going for a whole phase like his bamboo sword thing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not a phase!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not a phase!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not a phase!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still, welcome back, Captain!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still, welcome back, Captain!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still, welcome back, Captain!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. You've all held out well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. You've all held out well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. You've all held out well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a long story... I'll explain once everything's settled.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a long story... I'll explain once everything's settled.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a long story... I'll explain once everything's settled.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry, Dame Fione. My absence placed too much burden on you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry, Dame Fione. My absence placed too much burden on you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry, Dame Fione. My absence placed too much burden on you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I won't ask for forgiveness, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I won't ask for forgiveness, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I won't ask for forgiveness, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's not like you, Captain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's not like you, Captain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's not like you, Captain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Feel free to call me <color=#ffd34c>Deputy</color>, as usual, <color=#ffd34c>Captain</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Feel free to call me <color=#ffd34c>Deputy</color>, as usual, <color=#ffd34c>Captain</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Feel free to call me <color=#ffd34c>Deputy</color>, as usual, <color=#ffd34c>Captain</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Right. I guess I made you worry more than I realized.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Right. I guess I made you worry more than I realized.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Right. I guess I made you worry more than I realized.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A captain should always lead by example.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A captain should always lead by example.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A captain should always lead by example.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But how did you end up here, Captain...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But how did you end up here, Captain...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But how did you end up here, Captain...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sloppy, Fione. You're still walking around with that on you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sloppy, Fione. You're still walking around with that on you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sloppy, Fione. You're still walking around with that on you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're gonna trust someone, don't let it be Medea.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're gonna trust someone, don't let it be Medea.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're gonna trust someone, don't let it be Medea.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A miniature wiretap?! When did you do this?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A miniature wiretap?! When did you do this?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A miniature wiretap?! When did you do this?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, before you go, could I have a moment with you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, before you go, could I have a moment with you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, before you go, could I have a moment with you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pardon?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pardon?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pardon?

records.m_Talk_ENG: D-Dame Medea?
records.m_Talk_DEU: D-Dame Medea?
records.m_Talk_FRA: D-Dame Medea?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. Just a hug to wish you a safe return.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. Just a hug to wish you a safe return.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. Just a hug to wish you a safe return.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now that I've done this, you know you can't lose, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now that I've done this, you know you can't lose, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now that I've done this, you know you can't lose, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Of course. I won't.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Of course. I won't.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Of course. I won't.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll see you when I get back, Dame Medea.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll see you when I get back, Dame Medea.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll see you when I get back, Dame Medea.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So this all started back at HQ?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So this all started back at HQ?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So this all started back at HQ?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We needed someone ready to extract Dame Arius in case the rescue went sideways.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We needed someone ready to extract Dame Arius in case the rescue went sideways.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We needed someone ready to extract Dame Arius in case the rescue went sideways.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They say you have to fool your allies before you can fool the enemy, but I'm sorry for planting a bug without asking.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They say you have to fool your allies before you can fool the enemy, but I'm sorry for planting a bug without asking.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They say you have to fool your allies before you can fool the enemy, but I'm sorry for planting a bug without asking.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh... But isn't Ozymandias with Red Shift?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh... But isn't Ozymandias with Red Shift?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh... But isn't Ozymandias with Red Shift?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's our enemy!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's our enemy!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's our enemy!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're just now realizing that? I literally just saved your butts!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're just now realizing that? I literally just saved your butts!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're just now realizing that? I literally just saved your butts!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, still...
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, still...
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, still...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's all right, Dame Liv.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's all right, Dame Liv.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's all right, Dame Liv.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? It is?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? It is?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? It is?

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the Charade Gauntlet finals...
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the Charade Gauntlet finals...
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the Charade Gauntlet finals...

records.m_Talk_ENG: She chose defeat over bloodstained glory, even when victory was within her grasp.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She chose defeat over bloodstained glory, even when victory was within her grasp.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She chose defeat over bloodstained glory, even when victory was within her grasp.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if she's pursuing personal profit, she's not like the others in Red Shift.94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if she's pursuing personal profit, she's not like the others in Red Shift.94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if she's pursuing personal profit, she's not like the others in Red Shift.94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Dame Leonhardt is a knight I trust.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Dame Leonhardt is a knight I trust.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Dame Leonhardt is a knight I trust.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We couldn't ask for a stronger ally than Red Shift's own deputy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We couldn't ask for a stronger ally than Red Shift's own deputy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We couldn't ask for a stronger ally than Red Shift's own deputy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Exactly! She might be a pain, but Dame Leonhardt's an exceptional knight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Exactly! She might be a pain, but Dame Leonhardt's an exceptional knight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Exactly! She might be a pain, but Dame Leonhardt's an exceptional knight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bet she's lost sleep worrying about the Order, even if she never says it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bet she's lost sleep worrying about the Order, even if she never says it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bet she's lost sleep worrying about the Order, even if she never says it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't that right, Dame Leonhardt?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't that right, Dame Leonhardt?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't that right, Dame Leonhardt?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Zip it. You're making me sick.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Zip it. You're making me sick.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Zip it. You're making me sick.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain, if I may. The Order's casualties are stacking up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain, if I may. The Order's casualties are stacking up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain, if I may. The Order's casualties are stacking up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now that Dame Arius is safe, is there still a reason to continue fighting Red Shift?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now that Dame Arius is safe, is there still a reason to continue fighting Red Shift?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now that Dame Arius is safe, is there still a reason to continue fighting Red Shift?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I agree. With Dame Medea here, HQ's forces must be dangerously thin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I agree. With Dame Medea here, HQ's forces must be dangerously thin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I agree. With Dame Medea here, HQ's forces must be dangerously thin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's unlikely, but if other Red Shift knights launch an attack...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's unlikely, but if other Red Shift knights launch an attack...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's unlikely, but if other Red Shift knights launch an attack...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. Carrie's holding the fort with a handpicked elite squad.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. Carrie's holding the fort with a handpicked elite squad.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. Carrie's holding the fort with a handpicked elite squad.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Carrie...? You mean my sister?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Carrie...? You mean my sister?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Carrie...? You mean my sister?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. The moment she heard you were hurt, she volunteered for base defense.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. The moment she heard you were hurt, she volunteered for base defense.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. The moment she heard you were hurt, she volunteered for base defense.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've got a great sister, Dame Fione.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've got a great sister, Dame Fione.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've got a great sister, Dame Fione.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As Dame Medea said, there's no need to worry about HQ.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As Dame Medea said, there's no need to worry about HQ.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As Dame Medea said, there's no need to worry about HQ.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If Red Shift keeps growing, they'll cause even more harm later.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If Red Shift keeps growing, they'll cause even more harm later.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If Red Shift keeps growing, they'll cause even more harm later.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To stop that, we have to finish them here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To stop that, we have to finish them here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To stop that, we have to finish them here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And judging by their actions, they don't plan on letting us leave anyway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And judging by their actions, they don't plan on letting us leave anyway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And judging by their actions, they don't plan on letting us leave anyway.

8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hahaha!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hahaha!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hahaha!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oww... That ship really squashed me... Not something you experience every day...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oww... That ship really squashed me... Not something you experience every day...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oww... That ship really squashed me... Not something you experience every day...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And it fried the comms... Captain's gonna kill me for this...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And it fried the comms... Captain's gonna kill me for this...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And it fried the comms... Captain's gonna kill me for this...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever! I'll just kill them all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever! I'll just kill them all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever! I'll just kill them all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He's gonna yell at me either way, so I might as well enjoy myself, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: He's gonna yell at me either way, so I might as well enjoy myself, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: He's gonna yell at me either way, so I might as well enjoy myself, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So... let's all die together here, okay?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So... let's all die together here, okay?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So... let's all die together here, okay?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's still alive?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's still alive?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's still alive?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, did she just stick something into her Armament?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, did she just stick something into her Armament?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, did she just stick something into her Armament?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's one of the new reactors we used during the Qliphoth Game!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's one of the new reactors we used during the Qliphoth Game!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's one of the new reactors we used during the Qliphoth Game!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's single-use, built for short-term combat. How is she even activating it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's single-use, built for short-term combat. How is she even activating it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's single-use, built for short-term combat. How is she even activating it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone! The C.O.s...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone! The C.O.s...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone! The C.O.s...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Again?! We're doing this again?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Again?! We're doing this again?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Again?! We're doing this again?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Relax. They're just Doppelganger-type C.O.s, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Relax. They're just Doppelganger-type C.O.s, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Relax. They're just Doppelganger-type C.O.s, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What kind of knights are you if you're scared of Shadows?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What kind of knights are you if you're scared of Shadows?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What kind of knights are you if you're scared of Shadows?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're using the C.O.s like living bombs.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're using the C.O.s like living bombs.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're using the C.O.s like living bombs.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Every single one here is a guided explosive that keeps regenerating!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Every single one here is a guided explosive that keeps regenerating!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Every single one here is a guided explosive that keeps regenerating!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Simple solution, then. Just don't let them get close.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Simple solution, then. Just don't let them get close.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Simple solution, then. Just don't let them get close.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That just so happens to be my specialty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That just so happens to be my specialty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That just so happens to be my specialty.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The whip sword...?! Are you planning to take control of the entire field?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The whip sword...?! Are you planning to take control of the entire field?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The whip sword...?! Are you planning to take control of the entire field?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What, surprised? You didn't actually expect me to coordinate with you, did you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What, surprised? You didn't actually expect me to coordinate with you, did you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What, surprised? You didn't actually expect me to coordinate with you, did you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll handle things on my end. You go take care of yours.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll handle things on my end. You go take care of yours.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll handle things on my end. You go take care of yours.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We've roughly pinpointed Carantisir's location. Ask your captain for the details.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've roughly pinpointed Carantisir's location. Ask your captain for the details.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've roughly pinpointed Carantisir's location. Ask your captain for the details.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But Ozymandias, even you can't take all that on alone...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But Ozymandias, even you can't take all that on alone...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But Ozymandias, even you can't take all that on alone...

records.m_Talk_ENG: She can, and she will. I'll stay behind too, just in case.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She can, and she will. I'll stay behind too, just in case.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She can, and she will. I'll stay behind too, just in case.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unless... what, you think the two of us aren't enough?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unless... what, you think the two of us aren't enough?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unless... what, you think the two of us aren't enough?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're asking whether I worry about that side of the fight, then yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're asking whether I worry about that side of the fight, then yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're asking whether I worry about that side of the fight, then yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But as Dame Medea said, your help is more than we could ask for.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But as Dame Medea said, your help is more than we could ask for.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But as Dame Medea said, your help is more than we could ask for.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Knights! Our target is Red Shift's captain, Carantisir!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Knights! Our target is Red Shift's captain, Carantisir!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Knights! Our target is Red Shift's captain, Carantisir!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If he wields his sword to disprove our justice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If he wields his sword to disprove our justice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If he wields his sword to disprove our justice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then let's show him why we took up arms in the first place!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then let's show him why we took up arms in the first place!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then let's show him why we took up arms in the first place!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you babbling about?! As if you could ever reach our captain!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you babbling about?! As if you could ever reach our captain!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you babbling about?! As if you could ever reach our captain!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Take this!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Take this!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Take this!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aaaaagh!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aaaaagh!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aaaaagh!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What, planning to stick around just to get in my way?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What, planning to stick around just to get in my way?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What, planning to stick around just to get in my way?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't act tough. I know Swan's last hit still left a mark.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't act tough. I know Swan's last hit still left a mark.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't act tough. I know Swan's last hit still left a mark.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I'm doing you a favor. You'd better thank me later.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So I'm doing you a favor. You'd better thank me later.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So I'm doing you a favor. You'd better thank me later.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aww. Is that your way of saying you want to bash heads together?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aww. Is that your way of saying you want to bash heads together?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aww. Is that your way of saying you want to bash heads together?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fine, I guess. Trends always have a way of reappearing anyway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fine, I guess. Trends always have a way of reappearing anyway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fine, I guess. Trends always have a way of reappearing anyway.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not really what I wanted, but I'll go retro this time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not really what I wanted, but I'll go retro this time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not really what I wanted, but I'll go retro this time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll take on that crab, so you handle the small fry and try not to slow me down.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll take on that crab, so you handle the small fry and try not to slow me down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You hit your head or something, Julia?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You hit your head or something, Julia?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You hit your head or something, Julia?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? I expected a big reaction, but everyone's awfully quiet.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? I expected a big reaction, but everyone's awfully quiet.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Watch it, missy. Just how hard did you ride the others for them to be that jumpy around you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't think that's it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Probably.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Probably.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Probably.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hansol, did I really just see what I think I saw?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hansol, did I really just see what I think I saw?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hansol, did I really just see what I think I saw?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A ship crash-landed right in the middle of enemy territory... and Captain leapt out of it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A ship crash-landed right in the middle of enemy territory... and Captain leapt out of it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A ship crash-landed right in the middle of enemy territory... and Captain leapt out of it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's not another Doppelganger-type C.O., is it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's not another Doppelganger-type C.O., is it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's not another Doppelganger-type C.O., is it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Without a special Artifact, that would be impossible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Without a special Artifact, that would be impossible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Without a special Artifact, that would be impossible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So it's really her?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So it's really her?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So it's really her?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Seems... like it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Seems... like it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Seems... like it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're late, Captain! Where the hell have you been all this time?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're late, Captain! Where the hell have you been all this time?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're late, Captain! Where the hell have you been all this time?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: And what's with the robe? Trying out a new style? or are you pulling a Hansol and going for a whole phase like his bamboo sword thing?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And what's with the robe? Trying out a new style? or are you pulling a Hansol and going for a whole phase like his bamboo sword thing?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And what's with the robe? Trying out a new style? or are you pulling a Hansol and going for a whole phase like his bamboo sword thing?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's not a phase!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's not a phase!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's not a phase!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still, welcome back, Captain!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Still, welcome back, Captain!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Still, welcome back, Captain!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. You've all held out well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. You've all held out well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. You've all held out well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's a long story... I'll explain once everything's settled.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's a long story... I'll explain once everything's settled.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's a long story... I'll explain once everything's settled.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry, Dame Fione. My absence placed too much burden on you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry, Dame Fione. My absence placed too much burden on you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry, Dame Fione. My absence placed too much burden on you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I won't ask for forgiveness, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I won't ask for forgiveness, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I won't ask for forgiveness, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's not like you, Captain.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's not like you, Captain.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's not like you, Captain.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Feel free to call me <color=#ffd34c>Deputy</color>, as usual, <color=#ffd34c>Captain</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Feel free to call me <color=#ffd34c>Deputy</color>, as usual, <color=#ffd34c>Captain</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Feel free to call me <color=#ffd34c>Deputy</color>, as usual, <color=#ffd34c>Captain</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Right. I guess I made you worry more than I realized.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Right. I guess I made you worry more than I realized.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Right. I guess I made you worry more than I realized.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A captain should always lead by example.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A captain should always lead by example.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A captain should always lead by example.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But how did you end up here, Captain...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But how did you end up here, Captain...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But how did you end up here, Captain...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sloppy, Fione. You're still walking around with that on you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sloppy, Fione. You're still walking around with that on you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sloppy, Fione. You're still walking around with that on you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you're gonna trust someone, don't let it be Medea.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you're gonna trust someone, don't let it be Medea.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you're gonna trust someone, don't let it be Medea.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A miniature wiretap?! When did you do this?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: A miniature wiretap?! When did you do this?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: A miniature wiretap?! When did you do this?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, before you go, could I have a moment with you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, before you go, could I have a moment with you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, before you go, could I have a moment with you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pardon?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pardon?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pardon?

root.m_Talk_ENG: D-Dame Medea?
root.m_Talk_DEU: D-Dame Medea?
root.m_Talk_FRA: D-Dame Medea?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. Just a hug to wish you a safe return.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. Just a hug to wish you a safe return.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. Just a hug to wish you a safe return.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now that I've done this, you know you can't lose, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now that I've done this, you know you can't lose, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now that I've done this, you know you can't lose, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Of course. I won't.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Of course. I won't.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Of course. I won't.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll see you when I get back, Dame Medea.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll see you when I get back, Dame Medea.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll see you when I get back, Dame Medea.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So this all started back at HQ?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So this all started back at HQ?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So this all started back at HQ?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We needed someone ready to extract Dame Arius in case the rescue went sideways.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We needed someone ready to extract Dame Arius in case the rescue went sideways.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We needed someone ready to extract Dame Arius in case the rescue went sideways.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They say you have to fool your allies before you can fool the enemy, but I'm sorry for planting a bug without asking.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They say you have to fool your allies before you can fool the enemy, but I'm sorry for planting a bug without asking.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They say you have to fool your allies before you can fool the enemy, but I'm sorry for planting a bug without asking.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Uh... But isn't Ozymandias with Red Shift?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Uh... But isn't Ozymandias with Red Shift?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Uh... But isn't Ozymandias with Red Shift?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's our enemy!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's our enemy!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's our enemy!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're just now realizing that? I literally just saved your butts!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're just now realizing that? I literally just saved your butts!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're just now realizing that? I literally just saved your butts!

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, still...
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, still...
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, still...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's all right, Dame Liv.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's all right, Dame Liv.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's all right, Dame Liv.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? It is?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? It is?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? It is?

root.m_Talk_ENG: In the Charade Gauntlet finals...
root.m_Talk_DEU: In the Charade Gauntlet finals...
root.m_Talk_FRA: In the Charade Gauntlet finals...

root.m_Talk_ENG: She chose defeat over bloodstained glory, even when victory was within her grasp.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She chose defeat over bloodstained glory, even when victory was within her grasp.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She chose defeat over bloodstained glory, even when victory was within her grasp.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if she's pursuing personal profit, she's not like the others in Red Shift.94p
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if she's pursuing personal profit, she's not like the others in Red Shift.94p
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if she's pursuing personal profit, she's not like the others in Red Shift.94p

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Dame Leonhardt is a knight I trust.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Dame Leonhardt is a knight I trust.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Dame Leonhardt is a knight I trust.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We couldn't ask for a stronger ally than Red Shift's own deputy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We couldn't ask for a stronger ally than Red Shift's own deputy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We couldn't ask for a stronger ally than Red Shift's own deputy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Exactly! She might be a pain, but Dame Leonhardt's an exceptional knight.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Exactly! She might be a pain, but Dame Leonhardt's an exceptional knight.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Exactly! She might be a pain, but Dame Leonhardt's an exceptional knight.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Bet she's lost sleep worrying about the Order, even if she never says it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Bet she's lost sleep worrying about the Order, even if she never says it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Bet she's lost sleep worrying about the Order, even if she never says it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't that right, Dame Leonhardt?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't that right, Dame Leonhardt?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't that right, Dame Leonhardt?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Zip it. You're making me sick.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Zip it. You're making me sick.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Zip it. You're making me sick.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Captain, if I may. The Order's casualties are stacking up.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Captain, if I may. The Order's casualties are stacking up.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Captain, if I may. The Order's casualties are stacking up.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now that Dame Arius is safe, is there still a reason to continue fighting Red Shift?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now that Dame Arius is safe, is there still a reason to continue fighting Red Shift?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now that Dame Arius is safe, is there still a reason to continue fighting Red Shift?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I agree. With Dame Medea here, HQ's forces must be dangerously thin.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I agree. With Dame Medea here, HQ's forces must be dangerously thin.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I agree. With Dame Medea here, HQ's forces must be dangerously thin.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's unlikely, but if other Red Shift knights launch an attack...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's unlikely, but if other Red Shift knights launch an attack...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's unlikely, but if other Red Shift knights launch an attack...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. Carrie's holding the fort with a handpicked elite squad.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. Carrie's holding the fort with a handpicked elite squad.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. Carrie's holding the fort with a handpicked elite squad.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Carrie...? You mean my sister?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Carrie...? You mean my sister?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Carrie...? You mean my sister?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. The moment she heard you were hurt, she volunteered for base defense.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. The moment she heard you were hurt, she volunteered for base defense.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. The moment she heard you were hurt, she volunteered for base defense.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You've got a great sister, Dame Fione.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You've got a great sister, Dame Fione.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You've got a great sister, Dame Fione.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As Dame Medea said, there's no need to worry about HQ.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As Dame Medea said, there's no need to worry about HQ.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As Dame Medea said, there's no need to worry about HQ.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If Red Shift keeps growing, they'll cause even more harm later.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If Red Shift keeps growing, they'll cause even more harm later.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If Red Shift keeps growing, they'll cause even more harm later.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To stop that, we have to finish them here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To stop that, we have to finish them here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To stop that, we have to finish them here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And judging by their actions, they don't plan on letting us leave anyway.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And judging by their actions, they don't plan on letting us leave anyway.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And judging by their actions, they don't plan on letting us leave anyway.

What do you mean
8g

What do you mean
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hahaha!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hahaha!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hahaha!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oww... That ship really squashed me... Not something you experience every day...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oww... That ship really squashed me... Not something you experience every day...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oww... That ship really squashed me... Not something you experience every day...

root.m_Talk_ENG: And it fried the comms... Captain's gonna kill me for this...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And it fried the comms... Captain's gonna kill me for this...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And it fried the comms... Captain's gonna kill me for this...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever! I'll just kill them all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever! I'll just kill them all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever! I'll just kill them all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: He's gonna yell at me either way, so I might as well enjoy myself, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: He's gonna yell at me either way, so I might as well enjoy myself, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: He's gonna yell at me either way, so I might as well enjoy myself, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: So... let's all die together here, okay?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: So... let's all die together here, okay?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: So... let's all die together here, okay?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's still alive?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's still alive?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's still alive?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, did she just stick something into her Armament?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, did she just stick something into her Armament?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, did she just stick something into her Armament?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's one of the new reactors we used during the Qliphoth Game!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's one of the new reactors we used during the Qliphoth Game!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's one of the new reactors we used during the Qliphoth Game!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's single-use, built for short-term combat. How is she even activating it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's single-use, built for short-term combat. How is she even activating it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's single-use, built for short-term combat. How is she even activating it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone! The C.O.s...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone! The C.O.s...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone! The C.O.s...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Again?! We're doing this again?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Again?! We're doing this again?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Again?! We're doing this again?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Relax. They're just Doppelganger-type C.O.s, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Relax. They're just Doppelganger-type C.O.s, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Relax. They're just Doppelganger-type C.O.s, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What kind of knights are you if you're scared of Shadows?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What kind of knights are you if you're scared of Shadows?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What kind of knights are you if you're scared of Shadows?

root.m_Talk_ENG: They're using the C.O.s like living bombs.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They're using the C.O.s like living bombs.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They're using the C.O.s like living bombs.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Every single one here is a guided explosive that keeps regenerating!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Every single one here is a guided explosive that keeps regenerating!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Every single one here is a guided explosive that keeps regenerating!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Simple solution, then. Just don't let them get close.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Simple solution, then. Just don't let them get close.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Simple solution, then. Just don't let them get close.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That just so happens to be my specialty.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That just so happens to be my specialty.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That just so happens to be my specialty.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The whip sword...?! Are you planning to take control of the entire field?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The whip sword...?! Are you planning to take control of the entire field?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The whip sword...?! Are you planning to take control of the entire field?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What, surprised? You didn't actually expect me to coordinate with you, did you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What, surprised? You didn't actually expect me to coordinate with you, did you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What, surprised? You didn't actually expect me to coordinate with you, did you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll handle things on my end. You go take care of yours.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll handle things on my end. You go take care of yours.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll handle things on my end. You go take care of yours.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We've roughly pinpointed Carantisir's location. Ask your captain for the details.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We've roughly pinpointed Carantisir's location. Ask your captain for the details.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We've roughly pinpointed Carantisir's location. Ask your captain for the details.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But Ozymandias, even you can't take all that on alone...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But Ozymandias, even you can't take all that on alone...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But Ozymandias, even you can't take all that on alone...

root.m_Talk_ENG: She can, and she will. I'll stay behind too, just in case.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She can, and she will. I'll stay behind too, just in case.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She can, and she will. I'll stay behind too, just in case.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Unless... what, you think the two of us aren't enough?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Unless... what, you think the two of us aren't enough?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Unless... what, you think the two of us aren't enough?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you're asking whether I worry about that side of the fight, then yes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you're asking whether I worry about that side of the fight, then yes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you're asking whether I worry about that side of the fight, then yes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But as Dame Medea said, your help is more than we could ask for.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But as Dame Medea said, your help is more than we could ask for.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But as Dame Medea said, your help is more than we could ask for.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Knights! Our target is Red Shift's captain, Carantisir!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Knights! Our target is Red Shift's captain, Carantisir!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Knights! Our target is Red Shift's captain, Carantisir!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If he wields his sword to disprove our justice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If he wields his sword to disprove our justice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If he wields his sword to disprove our justice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then let's show him why we took up arms in the first place!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then let's show him why we took up arms in the first place!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then let's show him why we took up arms in the first place!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you babbling about?! As if you could ever reach our captain!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you babbling about?! As if you could ever reach our captain!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you babbling about?! As if you could ever reach our captain!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Take this!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Take this!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Take this!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aaaaagh!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aaaaagh!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aaaaagh!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What, planning to stick around just to get in my way?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What, planning to stick around just to get in my way?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What, planning to stick around just to get in my way?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't act tough. I know Swan's last hit still left a mark.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't act tough. I know Swan's last hit still left a mark.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't act tough. I know Swan's last hit still left a mark.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So I'm doing you a favor. You'd better thank me later.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So I'm doing you a favor. You'd better thank me later.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So I'm doing you a favor. You'd better thank me later.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aww. Is that your way of saying you want to bash heads together?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aww. Is that your way of saying you want to bash heads together?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aww. Is that your way of saying you want to bash heads together?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fine, I guess. Trends always have a way of reappearing anyway.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fine, I guess. Trends always have a way of reappearing anyway.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fine, I guess. Trends always have a way of reappearing anyway.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Not really what I wanted, but I'll go retro this time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Not really what I wanted, but I'll go retro this time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Not really what I wanted, but I'll go retro this time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll take on that crab, so you handle the small fry and try not to slow me down.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll take on that crab, so you handle the small fry and try not to slow me down.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll take on that crab, so you handle the small fry and try not to slow me down.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Slow you down? Me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Slow you down? Me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Slow you down? Me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You hit your head or something, Julia?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You hit your head or something, Julia?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You hit your head or something, Julia?
